description: Renta (Papyless) CSV title/type normalization rules. Raw rows are episode-level (第N話) and must be aggregated per 'book' using these rules.

strip_suffix_regex.comment: Color/vertical tag, does not influence aggregation.
Trailing volume number after 特装版 (e.g. 【特装版】1).
Trailing volume number after 分冊版.
Episode tail '第N話', optional '外伝X' or '.X' suffix.
Episode tail ' N話' without 第 (e.g. デイジー, 俺一人だけカンストレベル帰還者).
Side-story tail '外伝' after digits already removed (e.g. 双子兄妹のニューライフ外伝).
Trailing volume in parens like 俺だけレベルMAXなビギナー（13）.

classification.comment: Map raw title markers to GT 'type'. Order matters (first match wins).

sub.comment: Original タテコミ; becomes WR when a 完全版 sibling exists in the raw, otherwise WT.

amount_formulas.comment: Derived from GT (202604): all 112 rows match exactly.
amount_formulas.total_amount_jpy: round_half_up( SUM(価格 * (売上冊数 + アップグレード冊数)) * 1.10 )
amount_formulas.after_tax_jpy: SUM(価格 * (売上冊数 + アップグレード冊数))
amount_formulas.before_tax_income_jpy: SUM(支払額) + consumption_tax_jpy = floor( SUM(支払額) * 1.10 )

sibling_classification_notes: For 【タテコミ】 base books WITHOUT 分冊版/連載版/特装版 markers, the human splits EACH book into at most 2 rows: WR (non-完全版, aka 'original/改訂版') and WT (完全版). If only one variant exists, the single row is WT.
Detection: strip [完全版] / 【完全版】 / [改訂版] / 【改訂版】 to get the base key. If at least one raw row has that base key with 完全版, then the non-完全版/non-改訂版 rows are typed WR.
